stem: Beverly, the wellness program manager for an office building wants to include Nutrition Education as part of their wellness programming. In order to fulfill the requirement of N07: Nutrition Education, what is an acceptable nutrition education opportunity?

options.text: Gardening or planting workshops focused on edible plants that integrate hands-on learning opportunities.
Tours of local grocery stores with emphasis on healthy eating.
Organize a health-focused dinner club with regular occupants.
Bring in plant-based food trucks once a month for regular occupants.

explanation: N07 Nutrition Education, Part 1 Provide Nutrition Education 要求至少一種 nutrition education opportunity 免費、每季至少一次提供給 regular occupants；其中明列 edible plants 的 gardening or planting workshops，且需整合 hands-on learning opportunities。

B.gap: 把健康食物可近性活動誤認為正式 nutrition education。
B.followup: N07 Part 1 列出的教育機會是否包含 grocery store tours，還是要求由特定教學形式或專業人員提供？

C.gap: 混淆 communal dining 與具學習目標的 food literacy 教育。
C.followup: 如果是 dinner club，它是否滿足 N07 對 cooking skills、nutrition sessions 或 hands-on learning 的明確要求？

D.gap: 把提供食物選項誤當成 nutrition education programming。
D.followup: N07 Part 1 關注的是教育活動；plant-based food trucks 有提供每季免費的教學內容嗎？

stem: Feature N08: Mindful Eating dictates that spaces must have a dedicated eating space and that eligible employees must be provided with daily meal breaks. What verification method is required to submit the documentation for the dedicated eating space to IWBI?
explanation: N08 Mindful Eating, Part 1 Support Mindful Eating 的 dedicated eating space 需位於 project boundary 650 ft(200 m) walk distance 內，並滿足座位、環境保護與 seating types；提供的 WELL v2 標準文字可核對空間要求，但未列出 IWBI 文件提交的 verification method。

A.gap: 把空間設計圖面誤認為此題指定的提交方法。
A.followup: N08 dedicated eating space 要證明 650 ft 與 seating capacity 時，題目詢問的是設計圖還是 IWBI 文件類型？

B.gap: 把現場照片當成足以取代正式文件提交。
B.followup: 照片能顯示 tables and chairs，但是否能完整證明 25% peak occupancy 與 walk distance？

D.gap: 混淆 daily meal breaks 的營運政策與 eating space 文件。
D.followup: N08 Part 1 同時有 dedicated eating space 與 daily meal breaks；哪一項才需要 policy 或 schedule？

verify.note: Provided WELL v2 text verifies N08 spatial requirements but does not specify IWBI verification method; cannot confirm C from the standard excerpt.

stem: An office building in Vancouver wants to provide a dedicated eating space outside of the cafeteria. In order for this space to fit the requirements for Feature N08: Mindful Eating, what must the dedicated eating space provide?

options.text: Seating for 25% of the regular occupants of the building.
Protection from environmental elements (direct sunlight, rain, wind).

explanation: N08 Mindful Eating, Part 1 Support Mindful Eating 要求 dedicated eating space 提供 protection from environmental elements，例如 direct sunlight、rain、wind，或位於 climate-controlled space；同一 Part 也要求 650 ft(200 m) walk distance 與 seating capacity。

A.gap: 把用餐便利配備誤當成 N08 的空間性能要求。
A.followup: N08 dedicated eating space 的條文列出 tables、chairs、環境保護與 seating types；是否提到 condiment station？

B.gap: 記得 25% 座位門檻，但忽略題目問必備空間條件。
B.followup: 25% peak occupancy 確實是 N08 要求之一；本題哪個選項直接對應 environmental elements？

D.gap: 把茶水服務誤認為 mindful eating 的必要設施。
D.followup: N08 Part 1 的 dedicated eating space 是否要求 water and coffee，或是要求能避免日曬雨風？

stem: The World Allergy Organization reports that the prevalence of food allergies is ____________ in countries around the world.
explanation: N09 Special Diets 的 Issue 明確指出 World Allergy Organization reports that the prevalence of food allergies is increasing in countries around the world；這支撐 Part 1 Accommodate Special Diets 與 Part 2 Label Food Allergens 的需求。

B.gap: 把 food allergy 的全球趨勢方向完全判反。
B.followup: N09 Issue 為何要強調 special diets 與 allergen labeling？如果盛行率下降，這個風險論述會成立嗎？

C.gap: 誤以為 food allergy 盛行率已進入穩定平台期。
C.followup: 回到 N09 Issue 的用語，它描述 prevalence 是 plateauing，還是用 increasing 來建立需求？

D.gap: 把地區差異當成標準引用的主要趨勢。
D.followup: 即使各國差異存在，N09 引用 World Allergy Organization 時強調的是哪個整體變化方向？

stem: In order to accommodate special diets, main dish options must be available that meet which of the following criteria?
explanation: N09 Special Diets, Part 1 Accommodate Special Diets 要求 meals sold or provided 包含 main dish options，且需涵蓋不含 peanut、gluten、dairy、egg、animal/seafood/dairy products 等多種 criteria；單一條件不足以完整滿足 Part 1。

A.gap: 只抓到 peanut-free，忽略 N09 要求多類特殊飲食。
A.followup: N09 Part 1 的 main dish options 除了不含 peanut，還列出 gluten、dairy 與哪些其他限制？

B.gap: 只記得 gluten-free，沒有涵蓋完整 special diets 清單。
B.followup: 如果只提供 gluten-free 主菜，能否同時滿足 N09 對 dairy、egg 與 animal products 的 criteria？

C.gap: 把 dairy-free 當作唯一需要 accommodation 的飲食限制。
C.followup: N09 Part 1 為何用 meet each criteria，而不是只要求一種 dairy-free main dish？

stem: Feature N09: Special Diets lays out the requirements for the labeling of food allergens. What common allergens must be labeled on packaged food?

options.text: Hazelnuts, beef, pork, cheese and black beans.
Peanuts, fish, shellfish, soy, milk, wheat, egg, tree nuts and gluten.
Redskin peanuts, scallops, oats, garlic and onions.

explanation: N09 Special Diets, Part 2 Label Food Allergens 要求 foods and beverages 在 point-of-decision 標示是否含 peanut、fish、shellfish、soy、milk、egg、wheat、tree nuts 與 gluten 等 common food allergens。

A.gap: 把部分食物類別與肉類誤認為 common allergen 清單。
A.followup: N09 Part 2 的 allergen list 是否包含 beef、pork 或 black beans，還是聚焦 peanut、shellfish、milk 等？

C.gap: 混入過度具體或未列名食材，偏離標準 allergen list。
C.followup: N09 Part 2 要標的是 broad common allergens；scallops、garlic、onions 是否在條文明列？

D.gap: 忽略 N09 明確列出需標示的 common food allergens。
D.followup: 若標準已列 peanut、fish、shellfish、soy、milk 等，為何不能選擇 none of the above？

stem: Feature N10: Food Preparation requires a food preparation area, storage area and amenities like cold storage and microwaves. What space types are required to have these features?

options.text: All Spaces except Dwelling Units and Commercial Kitchen Spaces

explanation: N10 Food Preparation, Part 1 Provide Meal Support 分別列出 All Spaces except Dwelling Units & Commercial Kitchen Spaces、Dwelling Units 與 Commercial Kitchen Spaces 的要求；各類空間的 amenities 不同，但都在同一 Part 內被涵蓋。

A.gap: 只看到一般空間條文，漏掉 dwelling units 與 kitchen spaces。
A.followup: N10 Part 1 在一般空間後，是否還有獨立列出 dwelling units 與 commercial kitchen spaces 的要求？

B.gap: 把住宅單元要求誤當成 N10 的全部適用範圍。
B.followup: Dwelling units 需要 stove 和 refrigerator，但 N10 是否也要求一般工作空間提供 reheating 與 storage？

C.gap: 把商業廚房條文視為唯一必須符合的空間類型。
C.followup: N10 Part 1 對 primary and secondary schools 的 commercial kitchen 要求之外，還列出哪些空間類型？

stem: The WELL Building Standard™ (WELL™) recognizes that responsible sourcing practices and policies can help to promote sustainable, ethical and socially responsible food purchase and promote animal welfare. To implement responsible sourcing for Feature N11: Responsible Food Sourcing, what two items are required?

options.text: NON GMO Project verified and organic sourcing

explanation: N11 Responsible Food Sourcing, Part 1 Implement Responsible Sourcing 提供兩個路徑：Option 1 Sustainable sourcing 與 Option 2 Sustainable labeling；sourcing 包含 certified organic produce 與 certified animal products，labeling 則在 point-of-decision 推廣 certified organic、sustainable 或 local sources。

B.gap: 把 N09/N02 的 allergen labeling 混入 N11 sourcing。
B.followup: N11 Part 1 的第二個 option 是 sustainable labeling，還是 food allergen labeling？兩者服務的風險是否不同？

C.gap: 誤把 kosher certification 當成 responsible sourcing 要件。
C.followup: N11 要求 animal product line 可用哪些 certified organic、Certified Humane 或 seafood certification？有列 kosher 嗎？

D.gap: 把 non-GMO 與 organic 當成 N11 唯一採購框架。
D.followup: N11 的 sustainable sourcing 是否只看 NON GMO，還是同時設定 produce 與 animal product line 百分比？

stem: Providing gardening space to regular occupants of buildings and dwelling units can encourage consumption of fruits and vegetables and advance toward what other goal?

options.text: Lower the need for purchasing outside food.
Encourage connection to the broader community.
Have occupants collaborate on common activity.

explanation: N12 Food Production 的 Solutions 說明 gardening 除了提升 fruit and vegetable consumption，也可 fortify social cohesion and community involvement；Part 1 Provide Gardening Space 則要求永久、可及的 food production space。

A.gap: 把 gardening space 的目的縮小成替代外購食物。
A.followup: N12 Solutions 強調 gardens 的社會效益；它主要是在降低採購需求，還是促進 community involvement？

C.gap: 抓到協作活動，但未連到 broader community 的目標。
C.followup: 共同種植可以是手段；N12 對 community gardening 更大的 social benefit 是什麼？

D.gap: 只看到 physical activity，忽略題目問的 broader goal。
D.followup: N12 確實提到 physical activity；但在 fruits and vegetables 之外，哪個目標更貼近 community connection？

stem: Ensuring local food access can have a profound impact on the building occupants' health and well-being. Feature N13: Local Food Environment gives us 3 options for providing local food access. Which of these fulfills the requirement of this feature?

options.text: A seasonal farmer's market that operates weekly at certain times every year.
Discounted transportation to nearby green grocers.
A supermarket or store with fresh fruits and vegetables located with 0.25 mi walk distance.
A farmer's market located within 0.10 mi walk distance.

explanation: N13 Local Food Environment, Part 1 Ensure Local Food Access 的 Option 1 Supportive environment 要求 project 位於 supermarket or store with a fresh fruit and vegetable section 的 0.25 mi(400 m) walk distance 內，或符合指定 farmers' market 條件。

A.gap: 少了 N13 對 farmers' market 距離與營運月數的條件。
A.followup: N13 Option 1 對 farmers' market 是否只說 seasonal weekly，還要求 0.25 mi 與至少四個月？

B.gap: 把 discounted transportation 誤當成 no-cost transportation。
B.followup: N13 Option 3 Supportive transportation 要求交通是 discounted，還是 no-cost between project and fresh food venues？

D.gap: 距離看似更近，但缺少每週與四個月營運條件。
D.followup: N13 對 farmers' market 不只看 walk distance；它還要求 open at least once a week 多久？

stem: According to the World Health Organization, processed meat has been classified as carcinogenic and red meat is classified as probably carcinogenic. Providing plant-based meat alternatives can decrease the overall consumption of red and processed meats globally. What is the requirement for food that is sold or provided on a daily basis for Feature N14: Red and Processed Meats?

options.text: At least one plant-based options is available at each food outlet.
A single serving of red meat is no more than 6 oz.
Meat-alternatives are placed at the beginnign of the self-serve food lines.
Meat-alternatives are listed prominently on the menu.

explanation: N14 Red and Processed Meats, Part 1 Limit Red and Processed Meats 要求若 commercial dining spaces 每日銷售或提供食物，each food outlet 至少有 one plant-based option；同 Part 也把 red meat serving 限為 no more than 4 oz(115 g) cooked weight。

B.gap: 記得 red meat portion limit，但數值誤用為 6 oz。
B.followup: N14 Part 1 對 red meat 的 single portion 是 6 oz，還是 4 oz(115 g) cooked weight？

C.gap: 把應降低 prominence 的對象誤套到 meat alternatives。
C.followup: N14 要放在 self-serve line 結尾的是 plant-based alternatives，還是 red and processed meats？

D.gap: 把 menu prominence 策略方向顛倒為強調替代肉。
D.followup: N14 Part 1 要求 listed last 的是哪些 meat products？plant-based option 的要求是否是每 outlet 至少一項？

stem: Providing Gardening Space is an important aspect of providing opportunities for on-site food production. For dwelling units, what size gardening space is the project required per dwelling unit?
explanation: N12 Food Production, Part 1 Provide Gardening Space 對 Dwelling Units 要求 food production space 至少 15 ft2(1.4 m2) per dwelling unit，且總面積上限 1,500 ft2、下限 200 ft2，計算的是實際 growing area。

A.gap: 低估 dwelling units 的 per-unit growing area 門檻。
A.followup: N12 Part 1 對 dwelling units 的數值是否比一般 occupant 1 ft2 更高？明列是多少 ft2？

B.gap: 把 gardening space 面積記成接近但未達標的數值。
B.followup: 若每戶只提供 10 ft2，是否達到 N12 對 dwelling units 的 15 ft2 per dwelling unit？

C.gap: 接近正確面積，但仍低於 N12 明定門檻。
C.followup: N12 的 dwelling unit 計算是 12 ft2 還是 15 ft2，且是否有 200 ft2 最小總面積？

stem: What is the intent of Feature N13: Local Food Environment?

options.text: To increase access to fresh, local and seasonal fruits and vegetables by reducing environmental barriers.
To increase access to locally sourced meat and dairy.
To increase access to local farmers and food producers.
To increase access to locally produced food, regardless of ingredient origin.

explanation: N13 Local Food Environment 的 Intent 是 increase access to fresh, local and seasonal fruits and vegetables by reducing environmental barriers；Part 1 Ensure Local Food Access 透過 supportive environment、programming 或 transportation 實作此意圖。

B.gap: 把 N13 的蔬果可近性誤解為 meat and dairy sourcing。
B.followup: N13 Intent 中明確說的是 fruits and vegetables，還是 locally sourced meat and dairy？

C.gap: 只抓到 local producers，漏掉 fresh seasonal fruits and vegetables。
C.followup: N13 的重點是接觸農民本身，還是減少取得 fresh local seasonal produce 的環境障礙？

D.gap: 忽略 N13 對 fresh、seasonal 與蔬果類別的限定。
D.followup: 如果 locally produced food 不限成分來源，是否符合 N13 對 fruits and vegetables 的 intent？

stem: An apartment building is looking to ensure that the kitchen it provides in the individual units fits the requirements of Feature N10: Food Preparation. What is an example of an amenity that the project needs to provide occupants in the kitchen?

options.text: Stove with hood vented directly to the outdoors.
Water tap fitted with a reverse osmosis system.

explanation: N10 Food Preparation, Part 1 Provide Meal Support 對 Dwelling Units 要求 countertop surface、sink、refrigerator、cabinets，以及 stove with hood vented directly to the outdoors；toaster oven 或 microwave 屬於一般非住宅空間的 reheating device 示例。

A.gap: 混淆一般 dedicated eating area 與 dwelling unit 廚房要求。
A.followup: N10 Part 1 在一般空間列出 reheating device；dwelling units 的清單是否改列 stove with outdoor-vented hood？

C.gap: 把飲用水處理設備誤認為 N10 food preparation amenity。
C.followup: N10 dwelling unit kitchen 要求的是 sink、refrigerator、cabinets 與 stove；reverse osmosis 是否在清單中？

D.gap: 把額外冷凍設備當成標準要求的 refrigerator。
D.followup: N10 對 dwelling units 明列 refrigerator，但是否要求 chest freezer 這種額外設備？

stem: Which feature is a precondition in the Nourishment Concept?
explanation: Nourishment concept table lists N02 Nutritional Transparency as a PRECONDITION, along with N01 Fruits and Vegetables；N03 Refined Ingredients、N04 Food Advertising 與 N09 Special Diets are OPTIMIZATION features。

A.gap: 把常考的 refined ingredients 誤記成 precondition。
A.followup: 在 Nourishment feature table 中，N03 的狀態是 PRECONDITION，還是 WELL Certification 2 Pt 的 optimization？

B.gap: 把 Special Diets 的重要性誤等同於 precondition 等級。
B.followup: N09 Special Diets 雖與包容性相關，但在 Nourishment table 中標示的是哪一種 feature type？

D.gap: 把 Food Advertising 誤認為必要前置條件。
D.followup: N04 Food Advertising 在 Nourishment table 是 optimization；兩個 preconditions 分別是哪兩個 Feature？

stem: In Part 1: Provide Nutrition Education of Feature N07: Nutrition Education, to achieve 1 Pt, what is the session requirement if choosing the option of nutrition or dietary education sessions?

options.text: Sessions are led by a local plant-based chef.
Sessions are sponsored by a local Farmer's Market.
Sessions are led by an accredited dietician or nutritionist.

explanation: N07 Nutrition Education, Part 1 Provide Nutrition Education 要求 nutrition or dietary education sessions 由 accredited dietitian 或 accredited nutritionist 帶領，並且至少每季、免費提供給 regular occupants；bi-annually 不符合 minimum quarterly basis。

A.gap: 混淆 chef-led cooking demonstrations 與 nutrition education sessions。
A.followup: N07 中 chef-instructors 對應的是 cooking demonstrations；nutrition sessions 需要哪種 accredited professional？

B.gap: 把贊助來源誤當成教育 session 的人員資格。
B.followup: N07 Part 1 對 nutrition or dietary education sessions 要求 sponsor，還是要求 accredited dietitian/nutritionist？

C.gap: 注意到頻率，但把 quarterly minimum 誤記成 bi-annually。
C.followup: N07 Part 1 要求至少 quarterly；一年兩次的 bi-annually 是否達到 minimum frequency？

stem: What two options are available for Feature N05: Artificial Ingredients?

options.text: Artificial ingredient phase out or artificial ingredient restriction.
Artificial ingredient phase out or artificial ingredient labeling.
Artificial ingredient labeling or artificial ingredient restriction.
Artificial ingredient restriction or artificial ingredient education.

explanation: N05 Artificial Ingredients, Part 1 Limit Artificial Ingredients 提供兩個合規路徑：Option 1 Artificial ingredient phase out，最多三年內淘汰並標示 listed artificial ingredients；或 Option 2 Artificial ingredient restriction，要求每日供應的 foods and beverages 不含清單中的人工成分。

B.gap: 把 phase out 內含的 labeling 誤當成獨立 option。
B.followup: N05 Part 1 的 Option 1 是否包含 labeling requirement？它本身是否命名為 artificial ingredient labeling？

C.gap: 漏掉 phase out，將 labeling 提升為主要合規路徑。
C.followup: N05 明列的兩個 option 名稱是什麼？labeling 是哪個 option 的附帶要求？

D.gap: 把 education 加進 N05，但標準沒有此 option。
D.followup: N05 是限制人工成分的採購與供應要求；條文中是否有 artificial ingredient education option？

stem: In Feature N03: Refined Ingredients, whole grains must be present in _____ of sold and provided foods:

options.text: at least 35% of the granola bars.

explanation: N03 Refined Ingredients, Part 2 Promote Whole Grains 要求至少 50% of grain-based foods 中 whole grain 是 first ingredient；grain-based foods 指 grain flour 為第一成分或含 ≥30% grain ingredients 的食品。

A.gap: 把 whole grain 門檻低估為 25%。
A.followup: N03 Part 2 的 50% calculation 是針對 grain-based foods；你是否把它和無糖飲料 25% 混淆？

C.gap: 把標準誤解為只管 bread 且要求 100%。
C.followup: N03 Part 2 是要求所有 breads，還是所有 grain-based foods 中至少半數以 whole grain 為第一成分？

D.gap: 把任意食品類別 granola bars 誤當成計算基準。
D.followup: N03 的 calculation 是按 grain-based foods 計算；granola bars 是否是條文明列的獨立百分比？

stem: Reducing sugar content in foods and beverages is a central theme in the Nourishment concept. Standard menu items may not contain more than _______g of sugar per serving.
explanation: N02 Nutritional Transparency, Part 3 Label Sugar Content 針對 Commercial Dining Spaces 要求 standard menu items 不超過 25 g sugar per serving，或在 point-of-decision 標示/提示超過 25 g 的項目；N03 Part 1 也對每日供應的食品飲料使用 25 g sugar 門檻。

A.gap: 把 sugar threshold 記得過低，未對應 WELL 條文。
A.followup: N02 Part 3 與 N03 Part 1 都使用哪個 sugar grams per serving/container 門檻？

B.gap: 選了接近健康建議但非 WELL 明定數值。
B.followup: 題目問 standard menu items 的 WELL threshold；條文是 18 g 還是 25 g per serving？

D.gap: 高估允許糖量，超出 WELL 的 25 g 控制線。
D.followup: 若 standard menu item 有 32 g sugar，N02 Part 3 是否要求標示或用 icon 另外提示？

stem: For projects with commercial dining spaces, at least 50% of available food options are fruits and __________
explanation: N01 Fruits and Vegetables, Part 1 Provide Fruits and Vegetables 對 Commercial Dining Spaces 要求至少四種 fruits 與四種 non-fried vegetables，或至少 50% of available food options are fruits containing no added sugar and/or non-fried vegetables。

A.gap: 把 general starches 誤認為 N01 的 healthy food category。
A.followup: N01 Part 1 的 50% food options 是 fruits and/or 哪一類 vegetables？starches 是否被列入？

B.gap: 將 non-fried 的修飾語套到 chicken 而非 vegetables。
B.followup: N01 強調 fruits and non-fried vegetables；non-fried chicken 是否屬於 Part 1 的計算類別？

C.gap: 混淆 N01 蔬果供應與 N14 plant-based options。
C.followup: Plant-based meat alternatives 是 N14 的重點；N01 Part 1 的 commercial dining 50% 門檻要算什麼？

stem: An insurance company in Flagstaff is planning on providing daily food for their staff. The building will have an eating area on-site, but all food will be prepared off-site. Are the WELL Nourishment requirements applicable here?

options.text: Yes, this concept is required regardless of where food is prepared.
Yes, but only Feature N10: Food Production is applicable.
No, this concept does not have any requirements for outside food or food vendors.
No, this concept only applies for food produced on-site.

explanation: WELL v2 Foods and Beverages scope states that projects selling or providing food daily by, or under contract with, the project owner, including catering, are within Nourishment precondition scope; N01 Fruits and Vegetables, Part 1 also applies when foods are sold or provided on a daily basis by the owner or contracted vendor.

B.gap: 誤稱 N10 為 Food Production，且把適用性限縮到單一 feature。
B.followup: Daily catered food 是否會觸發 N01/N02 等 Nourishment preconditions，而不只是某一個 food preparation feature？

C.gap: 忽略 contracted vendors 與 catering 也屬於 owner-provided food。
C.followup: WELL Foods and Beverages scope 是否明說 under contract with project owner, including catering？

D.gap: 把 on-site preparation 誤當成整個 Nourishment concept 的前提。
D.followup: 哪些 dining-space features 需要 on-site preparation？Nourishment preconditions 是否也涵蓋 off-site catering？

stem: What is the intent of Feature N11: Responsible Food Sourcing?

options.text: To ensure that only organic and non-gmo fruits and vegetables are provided to buidling occupants.
To reduce dietary exposure to pesticides, hormones and antibiotics, limit environmental degradation and promote humane livestock practices.
To promote healthier eating choices at work.
To highlight the problems in the industrial food system and look for ways to purchase more locally sustainable foods.

explanation: N11 Responsible Food Sourcing 的 Intent 是 reduce dietary exposure to pesticides, hormones and antibiotics, limit environmental degradation and promote humane livestock practices；Part 1 Implement Responsible Sourcing 再以 certified organic、Certified Humane 與 sustainable labeling 實作。

A.gap: 把 N11 過度縮小為 organic/non-GMO produce 規則。
A.followup: N11 Intent 除了 produce sourcing，是否也涵蓋 hormones、antibiotics、animal welfare 與 environmental degradation？

C.gap: 描述太泛，混同整體 Nourishment 目標而非 N11 intent。
C.followup: Promote healthier choices 可以描述多個 Nourishment features；N11 特別鎖定哪些農業與畜牧風險？

D.gap: 抓到 sustainability，但漏掉 pesticide、hormone 與 humane practices。
D.followup: N11 是否只是 locally sustainable purchasing，還明確要求降低 dietary exposure 與促進 livestock welfare？

stem: A library in Seattle will be providing one dedicated eating area. In order to fulfill the requirements of Feature N10: Food Production, the dedicated eating area must be provided within what distance of the project boundary?
explanation: N10 Food Preparation, Part 1 Provide Meal Support 要求 supportive amenities 至少設於一個 dedicated eating area，且該 eating area 位於 project boundary 650 ft(200 m) walk distance 內；題幹中的 Feature title 與標準名稱不一致。

A.gap: 把 650 ft walk distance 門檻大幅低估。
A.followup: N10 Part 1 的 dedicated eating area 距離是 150 ft，還是 650 ft(200 m) from project boundary？

B.gap: 選了中間距離，但不是 N10 明定數值。
B.followup: 回看 N10 Provide Meal Support，supportive amenities 要在多少 ft walk distance 內的 dedicated eating area？

D.gap: 高估可接受距離，超過 N10 的 650 ft 要求。
D.followup: 如果 dedicated eating area 在 725 ft，是否仍位於 N10 要求的 650 ft(200 m) walk distance 內？

verify.note: Stem says Feature N10: Food Production, but N10 is Food Preparation; 650 ft matches N10 Part 1 Provide Meal Support.

stem: The WELL Nourishment concept seeks to promote the consumption of fruits and vegetables by increasing availability and accessibility. Around the world, most individuals do not meet the daily recommended ________ servings of fruits and vegetables.
explanation: N01 Fruits and Vegetables 的 Issue 說明 most individuals around the world do not meet the daily recommended five servings (400 g)；Part 1 Provide Fruits and Vegetables 因此要求提升 fruits and non-fried vegetables 的 availability。

B.gap: 低估 N01 引用的每日蔬果建議份數。
B.followup: N01 Issue 中五份對應 400 g；如果只記成三份，是否符合條文的 recommended servings？

C.gap: 高估 recommended servings，混入其他膳食建議印象。
C.followup: N01 引用的是 daily recommended five servings；你是否把更高的個別指南數字帶入 WELL？

D.gap: 把每日建議份數誇大到非 WELL 條文數值。
D.followup: N01 Issue 是否有提到 12 servings，還是明確寫 five servings (400 g)？

stem: Nutritional Transparency is a critical feature of the WELL Nourishment concept. In commercial dining spaces, what staff positions are required to have annual food allergen training?
explanation: N02 Nutritional Transparency, Part 2 Address Food Allergens 的 Option 1 Food allergy training 要求 all food service staff，包括 managers、servers 與 kitchen staff，每年提供 food allergy training，並且營業時至少一名過去一年受訓人員在場處理問題。

A.gap: 只選 managers，漏掉所有 food service staff 的範圍。
A.followup: N02 Part 2 是否只要求 managers 受訓，還明列 servers and kitchen staff 也包含在內？

B.gap: 只看前場 servers，忽略 managers 與 kitchen staff。
B.followup: All food service staff 在 N02 food allergy training 中包括哪些職位？只訓練 servers 足夠嗎？

C.gap: 只聚焦 kitchen staff，忽略服務與管理職位。
C.followup: Food allergen questions 可能由誰接觸顧客？N02 為何要求 managers、servers、kitchen staff 都受訓？
